cassandra.table.billingmode.CfnAbout: Determines the billing mode for the table - on-demand or provisioned.

cassandra.table.billingmode.Mode.Description: The billing mode for the table:  + On-demand mode - `ON_DEMAND`+ Provisioned mode - `PROVISIONED`

cassandra.table.billingmode.ProvisionedT.Description: The provisioned read capacity and write capacity for the table. For more information, see [Provisioned throughput capacity mode](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/keyspaces/latest/devguide/ReadWriteCapacityMode.html#ReadWriteCapacityMode.Provisioned) in the *Amazon Keyspaces Developer Guide*.
